verses.2: “Shouldn’t the multitude of words be answered?
verses.3: Should your boastings make men hold their peace?
verses.4: For you say, ‘My doctrine is pure.
verses.5: But oh that God would speak,
verses.6: that he would show you the secrets of wisdom!
verses.7: “Can you fathom the mystery of God?
verses.8: They are high as heaven. What can you do?
verses.9: Its measure is longer than the earth,
verses.10: If he passes by, or confines,
verses.14: If iniquity is in your hand, put it far away.
verses.15: Surely then you will lift up your face without spot.
verses.16: for you will forget your misery.
verses.17: Life will be clearer than the noonday.
verses.18: You will be secure, because there is hope.
verses.19: Also you will lie down, and no one will make you afraid.
verses.20: But the eyes of the wicked will fail.
